message:
feat(browser): add in-memory tables with full CRUD support

Phase 10 implementation adds ephemeral memory tables to LanceDatabase:
- MemoryTable class with row-major storage format
- CREATE TABLE / DROP TABLE with IF [NOT] EXISTS support
- INSERT INTO for adding rows
- UPDATE ... SET ... WHERE for modifying rows
- DELETE FROM ... WHERE for removing rows
- Full SELECT support with GROUP BY and aggregations
- Case-insensitive table/column name handling

Also enhanced _executeOnInMemoryData with GROUP BY aggregation support
via new _executeGroupByAggregation method for memory table queries.
